title: Rename device - Rename with no characters [New]
scenario: Done button remains enabled when all characters are cleared while renaming a device in Device Settings > General
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap on the device name field to edit it
Clear all characters from the name field
expected: When all characters are cleared, the Done button should be disabled (grayed out). After pressing Cancel, the device name should revert to the old name and be displayed correctly.
